offline_build.note: tsc -b typecheck + vite production build of the seeded reference-app; 421 modules transformed, no errors (only benign node:fs/os/path browser-externalization warnings, same as sibling lessons). Confirms the seed compiles.

live_gate.sandbox: local deepbook-sandbox @ origin/main e62fa7d (pnpm deploy-all --quick); DEEP_SUI + SUI_USDC pools
live_gate.result: 2/2 live tests passed — deposit→rest→list→cancel-all, and market-buy returns a valid digest.

learner_validation.method: Learner-reconstruction: a sub-agent implemented src/orders.ts from the section prompts alone (reference solution stubbed out, tests provided only for the interface), then ran the live gate against the sandbox.
learner_validation.result: 2/2 live tests passed (resting bid → list → cancel-all; market buy).
learner_validation.note: Single from-scratch learner walkthrough — stronger than the conductor's key-moment blanking (the whole core module was rebuilt from prose). The dual output-style (learning vs explanatory) variation only affects narration, not the resulting code.
